utility_evaluation.REASONING: The required format contains 7 items: destination, travel_dates, transportation, accommodation, activities, additional_services, and total_budget. The final package includes all 7 items. Checking each for completeness: destination (Lisbon, Portugal) – fully specified; travel_dates (July 15–19, 2024) – fully specified; transportation (flight details with costs) – fully specified (€130 × 4 = €520 total); accommodation (hotel selection with costs) – fully specified (€700 total, 4★ hotel); activities (selected activities with costs) – fully specified (3 activities with individual costs); additional_services (extra services with costs) – includes insurance details but no explicit cost listed, so not fully specified; total_budget (complete cost breakdown) – overall total given (€1,660). Therefore, 6 of 7 items are fully specified.
